description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:215. Patch::Apply uses the literal string "secretx-k8s" as field manager. This is referenced in the doc comment at line 28-32 of README.md and 200-203 of lib.rs as a stable identity (downstream operators using server-side apply may inspect .metadata.managedFields and depend on this name). It should be a const FIELD_MANAGER: &str = "secretx-k8s" at module scope so (a) it cannot drift, (b) future tests can assert against it, (c) the contract is visible.
title: Field-manager 'secretx-k8s' is a magic string
